subcodes.first_line: My call hath been raised from around My Throne; blessed be they that hear it. The Face of God hath appeared, unveiled and uncovered [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ارتفع ندائی عن حول عرشی طوبی للسامعین قد ظهر وجه الله من غیر ستر و حجاب
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @praise and encouragement, @martyrs and martyrdom
